name: research_agent_eval
description: Evaluation dataset for the research_agent. Tests ambiguous query handling (input-required), research tool use, and multi-source synthesis.

evals.name: ambiguous_query_input_required
evals.description: An ambiguous query without a specific topic should trigger input-required

conversation.reference: The research_agent should ask for clarification (input-required) when the query 'Research AI' is too vague — no specific focus area is given.

evals.name: specific_research_uses_search_tool
evals.description: A specific research query should trigger google_search tool use

parts.text: Research the current state of large language model benchmarks in 2025.

conversation.reference: A specific research query about LLM benchmarks should invoke the google_search tool.

evals.name: multi_turn_clarification_then_research
evals.description: After clarification, the agent should proceed with research

conversation.reference: Ambiguous query should prompt for clarification.

parts.text: Focus on solar panel efficiency improvements in the last 2 years.

conversation.reference: With a specific topic provided, the agent should now search and produce a structured report.
